svg.title: Live interview session
svg.desc: Three parallel streams: agent conversation loop in centre, STT/TTS voice bridge on the left, and face expression model on the right — all linked by a shared question ID and timestamp

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What context does the agent retrieve from ChromaDB per question?')
sendPrompt('How does the interview agent decide what question to ask next?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent evaluate a correct vs wrong answer?')
sendPrompt('What does each record in the Q&A log contain?')
sendPrompt('Which TTS engine converts agent text to voice?')
sendPrompt('What does the doctor experience during the session?')
sendPrompt('Which STT model transcribes doctor voice in real time?')
sendPrompt('Which model detects facial expressions in real time?')
sendPrompt('What expression labels are used — fear, neutral, stress?')
sendPrompt('How is the expression entry linked to the correct question?')
sendPrompt('What is the full structure of the interview report output?')
g.text: Expression log: emotion × question ID × time
